system_principle: The system operates as a lunar grief field in which 25 tanka function as perceptual anchors across the sacred landscape of Yamato province. The moon is the invariant connector; the absent person is the structural void that every tanka circles without resolving. Ma is the excess that prevents closure.

primary_loops.label: luna_connessione_universale
primary_loops.propagation_logic: The moon functions as a non-local connector: all separated subjects — the living and the dead, the one who stayed and the one who left — are simultaneously co-present under the same lunar field.
primary_loops.description: All absences (beloved in paradise, departed for distant city, dead irrecoverable) are unified through a single invariant perceptual field.

primary_loops.label: lutto_attesa_impossibile
primary_loops.propagation_logic: Mourning is encoded as continuous waiting toward an absent person who cannot return. The system does not resolve the grief; it stabilizes it as a permanent open field.
primary_loops.description: The system does not resolve mourning: it stabilizes it as a structural condition of the field.

primary_loops.label: tanka_compressione_emotiva
primary_loops.propagation_logic: 31 syllables function as a compression engine for emotional simultaneity: grief, love, waiting and impermanence coexist without resolution.
primary_loops.description: Emotional states are not sequenced but superposed within a single perceptual density.

primary_loops.label: calligrafia_campo_visivo
primary_loops.propagation_logic: Calligraphy operates as a parallel perceptual system preceding semantic reading. The brushstroke is embodied time rather than representation.
primary_loops.description: The visual field precedes and exceeds the textual field in every spread.

primary_loops.label: luoghi_yamato_memoria
primary_loops.propagation_logic: Sacred places of Yamato encode emotional memory rather than geographic description. Each place name carries its history as perceptual weight.
primary_loops.description: The landscape functions as stratified emotional archive across more than a thousand years.

global_state.system_behavior: The 25 tanka operate as a distributed perceptual network in which lunar invariance binds all separations — death, distance, time — into a single co-present field of absence.

catalog_connection.luna_piena_sulla_citta_antica: sister book — same formal system (Tanka series), same calligraphic layer, different basho (Kyoto vs Yamato), different dominant emotion (historical compression vs grief)
catalog_connection.ryokan_ali_di_carta_di_riso: shared field of Japanese contemplative experience and impermanence
